certificate.issued_by: Guardian Agent — Agentic Zero Pioneer Team

eu_ai_act.risk_rationale: Process involves AI interaction with users
requirements: Inform users they are interacting with AI

gaps: No explicit AI risk assessment or impact analysis for automated root-cause decisions
Missing transparency/explainability controls over hybrid AI outputs in 8D reports
Insufficient defined human oversight and accountability mechanisms beyond basic escalation rules
Lack of documented AI data governance and continual improvement processes specific to the agent
recommendations: Map agent capabilities to ISO/IEC 42001 Clauses 6.1, 8.2 and 9.1 with formal AI risk register
Add mandatory human-in-the-loop approval gates and decision-logging for all generated actions
Implement AI-specific KPIs (bias, explanation fidelity) alongside existing recurrence monitoring

issues: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
Data minimization: ensure only necessary data is processed
Retention policy: define how long data is retained

certificate.notes: Guardian review completed. Risk level: limited. Quality: 100%

remediation_plan: ISO 42001: No explicit AI risk assessment or impact analysis for automated root-cause decisions
GDPR: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
